description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets a default runner tag using the variable $RUNNER_TAG (initially empty) and includes a series of local configuration files: /.gitlab-ci.d/base.yml, /.gitlab-ci.d/stages.yml, /.gitlab-ci.d/opensbi.yml, /.gitlab-ci.d/containers.yml, /.gitlab-ci.d/crossbuilds.yml, /.gitlab-ci.d/buildtest.yml, /.gitlab-ci.d/static_checks.yml, /.gitlab-ci.d/custom-runners.yml, /.gitlab-ci.d/cirrus.yml, and /.gitlab-ci.d/windows.yml. The pipeline does not define any jobs directly; all jobs, stages, variables, and services are provided by the included files. Ensure the variable RUNNER_TAG is defined (empty by default) so that downstream jobs can reference it for runner selection.
